message:
fix(tools): harden TTL defaults, limit=0 semantics, and LLM provider formatting

Build slots (build_slots.rs):
- Fix TTL/extend handling: zero and negative values now correctly fall
  through to the default (1h for acquire, 30min for renew) instead of
  being clamped to the minimum. Uses match-guard pattern for clarity.

Contacts (contacts.rs):
- Apply the same zero/negative TTL fix for request_contact (7d default)
  and respond_contact (30d default).
- Update unit tests to verify the actual computed TTL value rather than
  just asserting the sign of the input.

Products (products.rs):
- Treat limit=0 as "unlimited" (i64::MAX) instead of defaulting to 20,
  matching user expectations for "fetch all messages".

Resources (resources.rs):
- Apply limit=0 as unlimited across all resource endpoints: inbox,
  mailbox, mailbox_with_commits, outbox, views_urgent_unread,
  views_ack_required, views_acks_stale, views_ack_overdue.

LLM (llm.rs):
- Formatting cleanup for provider prefix stripping chains (groq,
  deepseek, xai, openrouter).
- Add clippy::too_many_lines allow on resolve_api_endpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
